## Question 3 — Age bins for elected politicians

Complete the table, find median bin, modal bin, and approximate mean.

```{r age-bins}
age_bins <- c("18-30","30-40","40-45","45-50","50-60","60-80")
freq <- c(1,2,4,5,6,2)
total <- sum(freq)
rel_freq <- freq/total
widths <- c(12,10,5,5,10,20)
density <- freq/widths
midpoints <- c(24,35,42.5,47.5,55,70)
df_age <- data.frame(age_bins, freq, rel_freq = round(rel_freq, 3), width = widths, density = round(density, 3), midpoint = midpoints)
df_age
median_bin <- age_bins[which(cumsum(freq) >= (total+1)/2)[1]]
modal_bin <- age_bins[which.max(freq)]
mean_approx <- sum(midpoints * freq)/total
median_bin
modal_bin
mean_approx
```

Answers:

- Relative frequencies and frequency densities are in the table above.
- Median age bin: `45-50`.
- Modal age bin: `50-60`.
- Approximate mean age: the grouped estimate shown above (numeric value).
